# contraco

> Premium transformation consulting combining strategic clarity, technological intelligence, and psychological depth. Founded 1998 by Frank Meltke.

contraco is a premium transformation consultancy headquartered in Ava, Missouri, USA, with offices in Leipzig, Germany and Seoul, South Korea. The firm has served 50+ global brands across 30 countries including Microsoft, Deutsche Telekom, Thomas Cook, KPMG, and SK Telecom.

## Methodology

The Resonance Method is contraco's proprietary framework for digital transformation, developed over 28 years. It addresses a three-dimensional execution gap: strategic clarity, technological intelligence, and psychological depth. Organisations achieving alignment across all three dimensions show a fourfold higher transformation success rate.

## Founder

Frank Meltke — German inventor, Wikidata Q139680598, patent DE10313420A1 (2003), guest lecturer Kyung Hee University Seoul, Insight Panelist BBC Global Minds.

- [Frank Meltke](https://meltke.com)

## Languages

contraco operates across four domains: [English](https://contraco.net), [German](https://contraco.de), [Russian](https://contraco.ru), [Korean](https://contraco.co.kr).
